title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 271.260 - Taker-up not liable, when
text:
271.260.  Taker-up not liable, when. — If any stray, legally taken up, get away or die, without the fault of the taker-up, he shall not be liable for the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 14523) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12849; 1919 § 4339; 1909 § 840
